confronto_B.label: σ_px equivalente (primario conservativo)
confronto_B.citability: primario conservativo — σ_px equivalente (0.640), R fisico diverso (10 vs 5 Mpc/h)

confronto_C.label: R fisico E σ_px identici (ideale)
confronto_C.citability: ideale — stesso R fisico (10 Mpc/h), σ_px diversi (0.641 vs 1.280)
confronto_C.note: σ_px mock=1.280 > σ_px DESI=0.641 — mock più smoothed fisicamente

sigma_px_test.conclusion: b2 dipende fortemente da σ_px — bias griglia confermato e quantificato

correlazioni_R10.note: z_cond enorme — artefatto della regressione lineare con r(b2,Omm)=-0.79 dominante

o63_aggiornato_R10.note: Stesso pattern R=5: nessuna discriminazione tra modelli w0CDM

paper_statement_scenario2: The DESI BGS NGC b2_mean_persistence measurement deviates from the ΛCDM mock distribution at multiple smoothing configurations. At fixed physical smoothing R=5 Mpc/h (Confronto A), the deviation is +5.97σ; this configuration has different grid smoothing parameters (σ_px=0.321 for DESI vs σ_px=0.640 for mocks). At matched grid smoothing (σ_px=0.640 for both, Confronto B: DESI R=10, mock R=5 Mpc/h), the deviation is +3.09σ — consistent with the Phase 5 conservative estimate (+3.08σ). At identical physical scale R=10 Mpc/h for both (Confronto C), the deviation is +12.65σ. The grid discretization contributes ~2.9σ to the Confronto A estimate. We adopt +3.09σ (Confronto B) as the primary conservative result.
